description: Navigate to the DuckDuckGo Onion service (https://duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion/) and search for 'digital forensics'. Save the search results page as a complete HTML archive to /home/ga/Documents/Evidence/ddg_search.html. Create a metadata report at /home/ga/Documents/Evidence/archive_report.txt containing the full search result URL, the exact name of the asset directory created by the browser, and the count of JavaScript (.js) files downloaded into that directory.
